title: Actor document endpoint with AP content negotiation
description: Implement GET /users/:username returning the ActivityPub actor document. Content-type negotiation: application/activity+json or application/ld+json → serve AP doc; text/html → redirect to /@username; application/json → serve AP doc (Pleroma compat deviation from spec). The actor document includes keypair, inbox, outbox, followers, following, featured, and the hardcoded @context array from the spec.
design: @context: hardcoded array from spec (AS2, security/v1, toot extensions). Do not do real JSON-LD processing. Actor type: Person. publicKey.id = {actor_uri}#main-key. inbox = /users/{username}/inbox. sharedInbox = /inbox. outbox, followers, following as collection URLs.
acceptance_criteria: curl -H 'Accept: application/activity+json' https://domain/users/writer returns valid AP Person object; mastodon.social can fetch and parse the actor; @context includes all required extension terms (Hashtag, sensitive, toot:, discoverable, etc.); unknown usernames return 404
